meaning: vt.(做色拉时将肉鱼等在调味汁中)浸泡
examples: Use to marinate meat and poultry.
Please marinate the meat in the brine.
Be sure to marinate food in the refrigerator, not on the counter.
There are even recipes using stout to marinate teriyaki tuna, and as an ingredient in cheese fondue.
Learn how to fold a samosa or marinate the perfect lamb kati kebab, before enjoying the feast for lunch.
